Vibe Code Components by [![VCI](https://vibecodecomponents.com/assets/vci_logo-BhcivfmR.webp)](https://vcinc.ai/) Search components... `⌘K` Open menu [Favorites](https://vibecodecomponents.com/favorites) ![AI Homegirl](https://vibecodecomponents.com/assets/ai_homegirl-p1sBxRAM.png)Browse Components Vibe Code Components by [![VCI](https://vibecodecomponents.com/assets/vci_logo-BhcivfmR.webp)](https://vcinc.ai/) [Sign In](https://vibecodecomponents.com/auth) ![AI Homegirl](https://vibecodecomponents.com/assets/ai_homegirl-p1sBxRAM.png)Toggle theme Copy. Paste. Ship. # Vibe Code Components Unlock new possibilities and elevate the UX of your vibe-coded projects with this interactive library of reusable components. Copy a prompt, paste it into your AI tool, and instantly stand out from the crowd. [InteractiveUI](https://vibecodecomponents.com/#interactive) [Content](https://vibecodecomponents.com/content-components) [Micro-InteractionsMicro](https://vibecodecomponents.com/micro-interactions) [Forms](https://vibecodecomponents.com/form-components) [Nav](https://vibecodecomponents.com/navigation-components) [Heroes](https://vibecodecomponents.com/hero-components) [CTAs](https://vibecodecomponents.com/cta-components) [Story](https://vibecodecomponents.com/storytelling-components) [CSS](https://vibecodecomponents.com/css-animations) [Polish](https://vibecodecomponents.com/ui-polish) [Text](https://vibecodecomponents.com/text-effects) [![HighLevel](https://vibecodecomponents.com/assets/highlevel_logo-OMzPvyAW.webp)](https://vibecodecomponents.com/highlevel) [Premium](https://vibecodecomponents.com/premium) Most Popular ## Top Prompts The most requested components by our community ### Voice Typing Speech-to-text input with real-time transcription [View All Form Components →](https://vibecodecomponents.com/form-components) Click the mic to start speaking Clear Uses browser's native Speech Recognition API prompt Copy ``` Create a voice typing component using the Web Speech API: UI Requirements: - Microphone button that toggles recording - Visual feedback when recording (pulsing animation) - Stop button to end recording - Show interim/partial transcription in real-time - Handle browser compatibility gracefully (show message if unsupported) Transcription Behavior (Critical): - Accumulate all transcript segments during the session — don't send each segment individually - Only finalize the complete, accumulated transcript when the user clicks Stop - Handle the Web Speech API's auto-stop behavior (it stops on silence) by automatically restarting while recording is active - Use refs (not just state) for tracking recording status to avoid stale closure issues in event handlers - Show real-time transcription in the text box - Add a short delay (500-1000ms) after stopping to allow final results to process before flushing the transcript ``` ### Slide-Over Panel Settings panels, carts, and filter menus [View All Interactive Components →](https://vibecodecomponents.com/#interactive) Open Panel prompt Copy ``` Create a slide-over panel (sheet) from the right side: - Trigger button that opens the panel - Header with title "Settings" and description - List of menu items with icons: Profile, Notifications, Privacy, Preferences - Each item has an icon in a rounded container and label - Footer with a "Save Changes" button Panel should slide in smoothly from the right. ``` ### PWA Install Prompt Smart install prompt for iOS and Android [View All Mobile Optimization →](https://vibecodecomponents.com/premium) Desktop browser detected #### Install VibeCode Add to your home screen for quick access Show me how prompt Copy ``` Create a PWA install prompt component: - Detect device type (iOS/Android) - Android: Show install button that triggers native prompt - iOS: Show step-by-step instructions for Safari - Dismissable floating card with localStorage persistence - Auto-hide if already installed (standalone mode) - Toast notification on successful install - Device-specific icons and copy. ``` ## Interactive Components Tooltips, modals, menus, and more. Components that respond to user interaction. ### Tooltips Explain features on hover/tap with helpful context Help prompt Copy ``` Create tooltip components that appear on hover. Include three variations: 1. Icon button with tooltip on top 2. Button with text and icon, tooltip on bottom 3. Icon container with longer tooltip text on the right side Use a tooltip provider and ensure smooth fade-in animation. ``` ### Toast Notifications Micro-alerts and confirmations for user actions SuccessErrorInfoCustom Show Success Toast promptsuccess Copy ``` Create a success toast notification: - Green checkmark icon - Title: "Changes saved successfully!" - Description: "Your preferences have been updated." - Auto-dismisses after 4 seconds Use the sonner library for smooth animations. ``` ### Modal / Pop-up Lead magnets, information dialogs, and alerts Open Modal prompt Copy ``` Create a modal dialog component for a newsletter signup: - Trigger button with sparkle icon - Modal with header containing icon, title, and description - Email input field with styled placeholder - Footer with "Maybe later" ghost button and "Subscribe" primary button Include smooth open/close animations and backdrop blur. ``` ### Slide-Over Panel Settings panels, carts, and filter menus Open Panel prompt Copy ``` Create a slide-over panel (sheet) from the right side: - Trigger button that opens the panel - Header with title "Settings" and description - List of menu items with icons: Profile, Notifications, Privacy, Preferences - Each item has an icon in a rounded container and label - Footer with a "Save Changes" button Panel should slide in smoothly from the right. ``` ### Tabs Organize content into switchable sections PreviewCodeSettings Preview content goes here. This is what users see. prompt Copy ``` Create a tabs component with three tabs: 1. Preview tab with eye icon 2. Code tab with code icon 3. Settings tab with gear icon Each tab has its own content panel that appears below. Use a grid layout for the tab triggers and add subtle background to content panels. ``` ### Accordion Collapsible FAQ sections and information blocks ### How do I get started? ### Is there a free trial? ### Can I cancel anytime? prompt Copy ``` Create an accordion component for FAQ section with three items: 1. "How do I get started?" - Answer about signup and onboarding 2. "Is there a free trial?" - Answer about 14-day trial 3. "Can I cancel anytime?" - Answer about cancellation policy Only one item can be open at a time. Include smooth expand/collapse animation with rotating chevron indicator. ``` ### Hover Card Rich preview cards that appear on hover JD @johndoe Hover for details prompt Copy ``` Create a hover card component that shows a user profile: - Trigger is a compact user card with avatar, username, and "Hover for details" - Hover content shows expanded profile with larger avatar, full name, username, bio, location, and join date Card should appear smoothly on hover with subtle animation. ``` ### Draggable Cards Reorderable list items with drag and drop Design homepage High priority Review pull requests Medium priority Update documentation Low priority prompt Copy ``` Create a draggable card list for tasks: - Each card has a grip handle icon for dragging - Task title and priority label (High=red, Medium=yellow, Low=green) - Star and Archive action buttons on the right - Cards can be reordered by dragging Use native HTML5 drag and drop API. ``` ### Toggle Switches Settings controls for preferences like dark mode Dark Mode Notifications Private Mode Auto Sync prompt Copy ``` Create a settings panel with toggle switches: - Four toggle options in a vertical list - Each row has: icon, label, and toggle switch - Options: Dark Mode (moon), Notifications (bell), Private Mode (lock), Auto Sync (wifi) - Dark Mode toggle should actually control the page theme using next-themes - Subtle card styling with border and rounded corners for each row. ``` ### Dropdown Menu Multi-level menus with icons and keyboard shortcuts Options prompt Copy ``` Create a dropdown menu with multiple sections: - Trigger button with "Options" text and chevron icon - Menu sections: My Account header, then Profile/Billing/Settings with icons and keyboard shortcuts - Nested submenu for "Invite users" with Email and Message options - Destructive "Log out" item at the bottom with red text ``` ### Context Menu Right-click menus with actions and submenus Right-click here prompt Copy ``` Create a context menu that appears on right-click: - Dashed border container with "Right-click here" text - Menu items: Copy, Cut, Paste with icons and shortcuts - Nested "Share" submenu with Email link, Copy link, Messages - Checkbox item "Show Hidden Files" that toggles state - Destructive Delete item at the bottom ``` ### Command Palette Searchable command menu with keyboard navigation Search... `⌘K` prompt Copy ``` Create a command palette (like VS Code or Spotlight): - Trigger button showing search icon, placeholder text, and ⌘K shortcut - Opens with ⌘K keyboard shortcut - Grouped commands: Suggestions and Settings sections - Each item has icon, label, and optional keyboard shortcut Use cmdk library via shadcn's Command component. ``` ### Search Autocomplete Search input with suggestions and keyboard navigation prompt Copy ``` Create a search input with autocomplete dropdown: - Search input with icon and clear button - When empty, show "Recent" and "Trending" sections - When typing, filter through results showing title and category - Keyboard navigation with arrow keys - "No results" message when no matches found. ``` ### Spotlight Tour Premium Multi-step guided walkthrough with element highlighting JD John Doe Demo Content Area Start Tour prompt Premium ``` Create a spotlight tour component: - Multi-step walkthrough of UI elements - Backdrop overlay with s... ``` [Unlock with Premium](https://vibecodecomponents.com/premium) ### Resizable Panels Premium Split view panels with draggable dividers Explorer index.tsx App.tsx styles.css utils.ts Editor import React from'react'; export constApp = () =\> { return (
Hello World
); }; Terminal $ npm run dev ✓ Ready in 234ms Local: http://localhost:5173 Preview 👋 Hello World prompt Premium ``` Create resizable panels layout: - Multiple panels with draggable dividers - Min/max size constraints... ``` [Unlock with Premium](https://vibecodecomponents.com/premium) ### Nested Drag & Drop Premium Trello-style boards with cross-container dragging ### To Do 2 Research competitors Design wireframes Add task ### In Progress 1 Build landing page Add task ### Done 2 Setup project Install dependencies Add task prompt Premium ``` Create nested drag and drop: - Multiple columns/containers - Drag items between containers - Visual ... ``` [Unlock with Premium](https://vibecodecomponents.com/premium) ### Keyboard Shortcuts Premium Global hotkey manager with visual cheatsheet Keyboard Shortcuts `⌘/` Pressed: Try pressing some keys... prompt Premium ``` Create keyboard shortcut manager: - Toggle shortcut panel with ⌘/ - Display all available shortcuts ... ``` [Unlock with Premium](https://vibecodecomponents.com/premium) ### Infinite Scroll Premium Virtual list with lazy loading and scroll memory User List 50 loaded (all) ![User
